title: SyncResult
description: Output of bin/sync.sh — branch rebase/merge against base. Consumed by skills/sync/SKILL.md.

status.description: 'up-to-date' = behind=0; 'synced' = rebase/merge ran cleanly; 'conflicts' = strategy stopped at unmerged paths; 'dirty' = working tree had uncommitted changes (refused); 'skipped' = base unresolvable or precondition failed.

strategy.description: Which strategy ran. Default is 'rebase'; --strategy merge for shared-history branches.

base.description: Resolved base ref name (e.g. 'main', 'develop'). May be empty when status=='dirty' (sync exited before resolution).

ahead.description: Commits HEAD has that base doesn't (post-sync count when status=='synced').

behind.description: Commits base has that HEAD doesn't (pre-sync count; 0 after a successful sync).

conflicts.description: Unmerged paths when status=='conflicts'. Empty array otherwise.
